channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered Release Date Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Koei Tecmo was present at the PlayStation State of Play event and confirmed an October 2026 release date for Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered.

This comes as especially good news for players, as earlier this year it was revealed that the upcoming title has been delayed indefinitely, as developers need more time to “fully satisfy” the fans and “improve the quality of the game”. Now, the title will launch on all platforms in Fall 2026.

Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered Releases October 2026

Koei Tecmo released a brand-new trailer for Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered, confirming that the new release date is October 1, 2026, with simultaneous launches on PS5, Xbox Series X/S, Switch 2, and PC via Steam. The developers also informed players about the pre-order bonus and different game editions. Players pre-ordering any version of the game will receive a Retro Style Red Hare Saddle. The digital deluxe edition includes the base game, 42 weapons for fusion, secret teachings, Wind Scroll & Tiger Amulet, Officer Concept Art Collection, and 42 Retro Costumes.

Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered Features Highlighted

The overview trailer also provided players with a new look at all the game modes and features for Dynasty Warriors 3: Completed Edition Remastered. First up was Musou mode, a Call House feature that lets you ram through enemies with your sword and use skill moves such as ‘Evasion’ and ‘Counterattack’.

Across different scenarios, players also got to see the Charge Attack in action, the Power Guard, and Just Power Guard. Then, players got a glimpse of some side content, including Wei Legend Side Story: Battle of Chibi, Wu Legend Side Story: Battle of Wuzhang Plains, and Shu Legend Side Story: Siege of Hefei Castle, which delves deeper into the world of Romance of the Three Kingdoms.

The developers also revealed a free mode for Dynasty Warriors 3: Completed Edition Remastered in the release date announcement trailer. This mode will allow you to freely roam through the battlefield while playing as your favorite officer. There are also Versus and Challenge modes to try out. A new system called Weapon Fusion was revealed, allowing players to create an ultimate weapon by combining other weapons.

Players will be able to dive into Dynasty Warriors 3: Completed Edition Remastered either solo or with a friend through 2-player split-screen co-op. Lastly, an opening editor and system settings were shown, along with the arrival of Ziluan, the protagonist of Dynasty Warriors: Origins.

In other news, here’s everything that was announced during the latest PlayStation State of Play event. Additionally, the release date for Silent Hill: Townfall, Control Resonant, Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis, and more was revealed. What are your thoughts on Dynasty Warriors 3: Completed Edition Remastered releasing in October 2026? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about God of War: Laufey being revealed at State of Play. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
